hero_badge: Private practice. One coach at a time.
hero_subtitle: Private one-on-one sessions with a coach picked for you. Real conversations, every time. The reps you've been missing, booked when you're ready.
panel_row2_detail: Slow the opening. Land the keyword.
panel_correction_quote: Try that again. Slower first sentence.
panel_progress_feedback: Notes and feedback after every session
metric_1_label: more time talking than a group class
goals_title: What are you here to practice?
goals_subtitle: Pick the one that's actually pulling at you. Your coach builds the practice around it.
goal_1_p: The interview you've been rehearsing in your head. The meeting you've been muting yourself in. Practiced out loud, until they stop being scary.
goal_2_p: Less translating in your head. More thinking in the language. The small confidence that adds up to a different version of you.
goal_3_p: IELTS, TOEFL, university interviews. The speaking section that decides something, rehearsed out loud, with a coach who's sat through it.
how_subtitle: From your first session to sounding like yourself in another language.
how_step1_title: Tell us what you need to say.
how_step1_p: A short call. We listen for what you actually need to say: at work, at school, in life. Then we shape the practice around it.
how_step2_p: Picked, not assigned. We pair you with the coach whose background, style, and voice fit what you're trying to do.
how_step3_p: One or two sessions a week. Real conversations every time. Inside a month, you'll hear the change. Soon after, so will everyone else.
learn_subtitle: Not grammar drills. The conversations from your real week, turned into reps.
testi_subtitle: Read enough of these and you'll recognise yourself in at least one.
testi1_quote: "I used to mute myself on calls. Now I'm usually the one running them. It happened faster than I expected."
testi2_quote: "My IELTS went 6.5 to 8.0 in eight weeks. The difference was simple: I was actually speaking, every session."
testi3_quote: "The English was always there. I just had nowhere to actually use it. Now I sound like myself, not like someone apologising."
trial_intro_title: Book your starter session. It's on us.
trial_intro_subtitle: Thirty minutes. No pressure. We listen for what you need, place you with a coach, and you decide what's next.
trial_proof_title: Find out what you actually need to work on, before you commit.
trial_proof_body: We listen for what you need to say. Place you with a coach. Sketch the practice. You decide what's next.
trial_proof_bullet1: We reply within a business day
trial_proof_bullet3: A plan built around your week
trial_subtitle: One of us will be back within a business day to set the time.
status_sent: You're in. We'll be in touch within a business day to set the time.
status_email_fallback: Opened your email client. If that didn't work, email hello@speexify.com.
final_subtitle: Book your first session. Try the practice ground. The first one is on us.
fomo_hero_scarcity: A small number of spots each month
fomo_urgency: Three months from now, the language you've been studying will still be the language you're studying. Unless you start using it.
fomo_trial_scarcity: We only take on members we can actually help. The starter call is how we figure that out, both ways.
